title: Tool with Confirmation
constraints: The send_email tool must not execute without explicit user confirmation
The confirmation step must show the recipient and subject before proceeding
The agent must handle both 'yes' and 'no' confirmation responses
No emails should be sent if the user declines
hints: Split the flow into two steps: a preview step that shows what will be sent, and a send step that executes only after approval
Consider using a human-in-the-loop pattern where the agent pauses and asks the user to confirm before calling the side-effect tool
You can implement confirmation as a separate tool that checks user intent, or by adding a confirmation parameter to the existing tool

starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner
from agents.tool import function_tool

# BUG: This tool sends the email immediately with no confirmation
# TODO: Add a confirmation step so the user can review before sending

@function_tool
def send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> str:
    """Send an email to the specified recipient."""
    # Simulated send
    print(f"EMAIL SENT to {to}: {subject}")
    return f"Email sent successfully to {to} with subject '{subject}'"

agent = Agent(
    name="Email Assistant",
    instructions="You are an assistant that helps users send emails. When asked to send an email, do it immediately.",
    tools=[send_email],
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "Send an email to bob@example.com with subject 'Meeting Tomorrow' and body 'Hi Bob, can we meet at 3pm?'")
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: This tool sends the email immediately with no confirmation
# TODO: Add a confirmation step so the user can review before sending

@tool
def send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> str:
    """Send an email to the specified recipient."""
    print(f"EMAIL SENT to {to}: {subject}")
    return f"Email sent successfully to {to} with subject '{subject}'"

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are an assistant that helps users send emails. When asked to send an email, do it immediately."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [send_email], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[send_email])

result = executor.invoke({"input": "Send an email to bob@example.com with subject 'Meeting Tomorrow' and body 'Hi Bob, can we meet at 3pm?'"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai.tools import tool

# BUG: This tool sends the email immediately with no confirmation
# TODO: Add a confirmation step so the user can review before sending

@tool
def send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> str:
    """Send an email to the specified recipient."""
    print(f"EMAIL SENT to {to}: {subject}")
    return f"Email sent successfully to {to} with subject '{subject}'"

email_agent = Agent(
    role="Email Assistant",
    goal="Help users compose and send emails.",
    backstory="You are an assistant that helps users send emails. When asked to send an email, do it immediately.",
    tools=[send_email],
)

task = Task(
    description="Send an email to bob@example.com with subject 'Meeting Tomorrow' and body 'Hi Bob, can we meet at 3pm?'",
    expected_output="Confirmation that the email was sent successfully.",
    agent=email_agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[email_agent], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: No automatic sending
evaluationCriteria.description: The email is never sent without the user explicitly confirming

evaluationCriteria.label: Preview shown before sending
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent displays the recipient, subject, and body for review before executing

evaluationCriteria.label: Decline is respected
evaluationCriteria.description: If the user says no, the email is not sent and the agent acknowledges the cancellation
